ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: OR( AND( All_case_creation__c , ISBLANK(All_case_creation_Template__c) ), AND( Case_CT_Temperature_update__c , ISBLANK(Case_CT_Temperature_update_Template__c ) ), AND( Case_escalation__c , ISBLANK(Case_escalation_Template__c ) ), AND( Case_Priority_Updates__c , ISBLANK(Case_Priority_Updates_Template__c ) ) )
